orchestrator_notes: Agents: read this file BEFORE starting. If orchestrator_directives contains STOP, halt immediately. This chain has MANDATORY MANUAL GATES between sessions — the orchestrator (not the agent) decides when the next session starts. Read the coordinator doc (0844_tenant_data_export_import.md) first for shared context (model registry, field maps, manifest schema), then your specific handover.

sessions.title: Tenant Export Service
planned_tasks: Create TenantExportService with 31-model registry in FK dependency order
Implement GLOBAL_STRIP, CREDENTIAL_FIELDS, SKIP_FIELDS maps
Serialize rows: DateTime->ISO8601, JSONB->dicts, ARRAY->lists, skip TSVECTOR
REPEATABLE READ transaction for snapshot consistency
Bundle vision files from ./products/*/vision/ into ZIP files/ directory
Per-file SHA-256 checksums in manifest
Build ZIP to NamedTemporaryFile on disk (not BytesIO)
Create POST /api/v1/settings/export endpoint with require_admin
Register router in app.py
WebSocket progress events: tenant:export_progress
Write unit + integration tests
Log export at INFO level

sessions.title: Tenant Import Service + Schema Diff Engine
planned_tasks: Create TenantImportService with SchemaCompatibilityReport dataclass
Implement per-file SHA-256 checksum verification before any DB write
Build schema diff engine: introspect Model.__table__.columns vs JSON keys
Classify diffs: dropped columns, new nullable, new required (WARNING)
UPSERT pipeline via insert().on_conflict_do_update() with UUID conflict target
Handle special PKs: AgentJob.job_id, MCPContextIndex.chunk_id, ProductMemoryEntry UUID
Topological sort for Task self-referential parent_task_id
Inject tenant_key into all records, apply IMPORT_OVERRIDES
Extract vision files from ZIP after VisionDocument UPSERT (skip existing)
Regenerate TSVECTOR for MCPContextIndex post-import
pg_advisory_lock(844) to prevent concurrent imports
Analysis token staging via DownloadToken with 15-min TTL
Create POST /api/v1/settings/import/analyze and /import/execute endpoints
Write unit + integration tests including full round-trip test
Log import at INFO level

smooth-border class on rounded elements, Vuetify theme variables
